Title: ST_SetSRID
Description: replaces the SRID of a shape but does not transform the shape or its coordinates from old SRID to a new one.

The geometry given as argument is modified to have the specified SRID and the modified
geometry is returned.
Examples:
SQL>SELECT ST_SetSRID( st_point (10,2), 4335);
callret
ANY
POINT(0.0197 51.1005)
No. of rows in result: 1
